data.title: Newcore Gold Files Technical Report for the Updated Mineral Resource Estimate for the Enchi Gold Project, Ghana
data.description: Newcore Gold Ltd. has disclosed the filing of the technical report backing the updated Mineral Resource Estimate for the Enchi Gold Project in Ghana, in compliance with NI 43-101 standards. The report was completed by DRA Americas Inc. of Toronto, Ontario, Canada. The Mineral Resource Estimate update can be accessed on the Company’s SEDAR+ profile at www.sedarplus.ca. Newcore Gold Ltd. is listed on the TSX-V as NCAU and on the OTCQX as NCAUF.

data.title: Saks Global Receives Disclosure Statement Approval, Advancing Toward Confirmation and Emergence
data.description: Luxury retailer Saks Global Enterprises LLC is set to proceed with voting on its revised Plan of Reorganization, which has garnered broad support. The company remains on schedule to complete its restructuring this summer, positioning it for sustainable growth in the future. The vote solicitation process is about to begin, marking a crucial step for the company as it aims to finalize its plans. The amended reorganization strategy has received significant backing and is paving the way for a successful emergence post-restructuring. This development signifies a significant milestone for Saks Global as it navigates its way towards a more robust and resilient operational framework.

data.title: R3 Ventures Joins Forbright Bank on Chase Tower Acquisition in Chevy Chase, Maryland
data.description: R3 Ventures, a real estate investment, development, and advisory firm based in Washington, D.C., has been chosen by Forbright Bank to provide specialized asset management services for their recent strategic acquisition of a headquarters in Chevy Chase, Maryland. The announcement was made on May 1, 2026. This partnership signifies a significant step for Forbright Bank, underscoring their commitment to optimal asset management practices.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures: Nasdaq, S&P 500 Set More Record Highs; Micron, Nvidia, Sandisk, Alphabet Are Big Winners
data.description: The Nasdaq and S&P 500 reached new record highs on Monday, with Dow Jones Futures showing positive trends. Leading the gains were technology companies Micron, Sandisk, Nvidia, and Alphabet. This surge in performance is indicative of the market's strength, with investors closely monitoring these developments. The overall upward momentum in these indices reflects a positive sentiment among market participants, highlighting the success of these particular tech companies.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Dips But Nasdaq, Nvidia Gain; Microsoft Up After This OpenAI Deal (Live Coverage)
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline, while Google's parent company Alphabet debuted on the stock market. Microsoft saw an increase following a recent partnership with OpenAI. The Nasdaq and Nvidia reported gains. Overall, the stock market showed mixed results, with specific attention to Microsoft's positive movement and Alphabet's market entry. This information was presented as live coverage and was not sourced from Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: GameStop Gears Up For EBay Takeover Offer: WSJ
data.description: According to a report from the Wall Street Journal on Friday, GameStop is getting ready to make a bid to acquire the e-commerce powerhouse eBay. Following this news, GameStop's stock saw an increase in after-hours trading, while eBay's stock price experienced a significant surge. This potential takeover offer has generated buzz in the investment community and was covered by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: BillionToOne Launches Unity Confirm™: A category-defining test that bridges the gap between screening and invasive diagnostics
data.description: In a significant development for prenatal care, Unity Confirm has introduced a new method that allows for non-invasive confirmation of high-risk screening results. This groundbreaking technology involves capturing intact circulating fetal cells through the use of BillionToOne's Fetal Cell Capture™ Technology. The advancement, announced in Menlo Park, California, on May 1, 2026, marks a potential shift in prenatal screening, offering a more accurate and less invasive approach. This innovation has the capacity to impact a large number of individuals, particularly those undergoing high-risk prenatal screening, by providing a more reliable method of confirmation.

data.title: SECOND NATURE BRANDS ISSUES ALLERGY ALERT ON UNDECLARED CASHEWS, PISTACHIOS, AND CHERRIES IN KETO CRUNCH SMART MIX
data.description: Madison Heights, Michigan - Second Nature Brands based in Madison Heights is issuing a voluntary recall of specific 10-ounce packages of SECOND NATURE KETO CRUNCH SMART MIX™ due to potential undeclared cashews, pistachios, and cherries. Consumers who have allergies...

data.title: Target Offers 10% Teacher Discount Nationwide During Teacher Appreciation Week, Alongside Year-Round Benefits
data.description: In Minneapolis on May 1, 2026, Target Corporation (NYSE: TGT) announced a special recognition for teachers nationwide. As part of Teacher Appreciation Week, Target is offering a 10% discount on all items in their stores. This initiative is in line with their continuous support for educators, which includes year-round perks and community engagements.

data.title: Joel Maser Named 'Gerald T. Hart Outstanding Tax Attorney of the Year' by The Florida Bar
data.description: On May 1, 2026, in Fort Lauderdale, Florida, Joel D. Maser, a shareholder at Greenberg Traurig, P.A.'s Fort Lauderdale office, received the prestigious "Gerald T. Hart Outstanding Tax Attorney of the Year Award" from The Florida Bar Tax Section. This award recognizes Maser's exceptional expertise and contributions in the field of tax law. This recognition reflects his outstanding reputation in the legal community.

data.title: AGNICO EAGLE ANNOUNCES ELECTION OF DIRECTORS
data.description: On May 1, 2026, Agnico Eagle Mines Limited disclosed at its annual and special shareholders meeting that all eleven candidates listed in the March 19, 2026 management information circular were approved. The company's stocks are traded on NYSE under the symbol AEM and on TSX under the same symbol.

data.title: Pennant Acquires Senior Living Communities in Arizona and Wisconsin
data.description: Eagle, Idaho-based company The Pennant Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: PNTG) recently disclosed its takeover of management operations for three senior living communities located in Arizona and Wisconsin, marking an increase of 194 units to their portfolio. This move became effective on May 1, 2026. These acquisitions were finalized through triple net leases, further extending Pennant's reach in the home health, hospice, home care, and senior living sectors.

data.title: Exodus Movement Acquires Outstanding Shares of Baanx US Corp. for $30M
data.description: Today, Exodus Movement, Inc. (NYSE American: EXOD) disclosed its acquisition of all remaining shares of Baanx US Corp. and select assets from W3C Corp. The transaction, valued at $5 million and paid upon asset transfer, also includes an additional $25 million in deferred payment spread over four years. Exodus is a prominent self-custodial cryptocurrency platform.

data.title: Badger Announces Voting Results of 2026 Annual and Special Meeting of Shareholders
data.description: Calgary-based company Badger Infrastructure Solutions Ltd. (TSX: BDGI) shared that during their annual and special shareholder meeting on May 1, 2026, all proposed motions received approval. The meeting saw active participation, with 27,386,225 common shares, equivalent to around 81.17% of the total issued common shares, being represented either in person or through proxy.

data.title: Spanish Mountain Gold Announces Closing of First Tranche of Royalty Financing and Receipt of US$22.5 Million
data.description: Spanish Mountain Gold Ltd. has successfully completed the initial phase of its royalty sale to Wheaton Precious Metals Corp., receiving US $22.5 million as part of the first tranche closing of the Royalty Financing. The total funding available to the Company from Wheaton is US $55 million. Trading under the tickers TSX-V: SPA, FSE: S3Y, and OTCQB: SPAUF, Spanish Mountain Gold expressed satisfaction in this development.
US Department of State: Approval given for potential foreign military sale to Israel of advanced precision kill weapon system worth $992.4 million

data.title: 2026 Brockton High School Film Festival
data.description: Students from Brockton High School have debuted their own films tackling themes of mental wellness and leadership. A total of 23 student filmmakers presented their unique perspectives on boundaries, bias, and leadership, with some of their works set to be featured at the prestigious National SALT 12 Film Festival. The event took place in Brockton, Massachusetts on May 1, 2026.

data.title: Republic Technologies Inc. Announces Application for Management Cease Trade Order
data.description: Republic Technologies Inc. disclosed that it could not meet the April 30, 2026, deadline to file its annual financial statements, management’s discussion and analysis, and certifications. The company, listed as CSE: DOCT, FSE: 7FM0, and OTCQB: DOCKF, cited the requirements of National Instrument 51-102 – Continuous Disclosure Obligations as the reason behind the delay.

data.title: Conifex Announces First Quarter 2026 Results Conference Call and Provides Operational Update
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on May 1, 2026, Conifex Timber Inc. disclosed its intention to unveil its Q1 2026 results prior to the market opening on Friday, May 15, 2026. The company, listed as CFF on the TSX, has arranged a conference call for May 15 at 9:00 AM PT / 12:00 PM ET to delve into its financial performance. Interested individuals can join the discussion by dialing the specified number.

data.title: ACT for ALS Reauthorization Act Introduced in the Senate
data.description: The ALS Network has praised the bipartisan bill introduced in the Senate, aiming to uphold progress in ALS research and availability of experimental treatments. On May 1, 2026, in Los Angeles, the organization voiced its approval for the legislation, emphasizing the significance of sustaining momentum in ALS research. This bill seeks to enhance access to critical therapies for ALS patients, reflecting a strong commitment to advancing treatment options. The ALS Network advocates for the importance of continued support for this cause, highlighting the potential impact on individuals living with ALS.
